parameters: Ah！ That's a new camera that I took out of the box just for today～！
Huh… You have two of them？
Yes！ I always buy two cameras in case one breaks！
…That tends to put me in a tight spot financially though…
That doll is one that my parents gave me when I was a child～
Back then, it was popular among girls, and it's called Pippi-chan doll！
Ah… Come to think of it, I think my younger sister wanted one too…
If your younger sister is the same age as me, she might know it too！
It's a computer. The power seems to be off.
It's a computer for managing photo data！
I use that printer over there to print out the photos I like！
Huh... Did you buy all the equipment around here yourself？
Yes！ I used all the money I saved up from my part-time job！
Yes♪ Ah, but I'm still working part-time sometimes, and
It's a bed. There's a slightly sweet scent.
Is that so？ My dad likes books and often gives them to me, but
Mostly they're just gravure photos of girls,
and I'm told 'You should take pictures like this!'
I like cute girls, but I'm more into characters than real people, so
If you're going to take pictures, it'd be better with cosplayers or something, right！
\N[0001]Senpai seems like the type to meet someone like Jukiya from Final Elf Online,
Ah... Jukiya... (My avatar is the Jukiya model...)
It's full of important things for girls！
Ah, s-sorry...！ I wasn't paying attention to that sort of thing...
Hehe... Did you see the design？
I haven't even shown it to Shibata-kun yet...
I secretly put Kana-chan's underwear in my pocket.
\N[0001]I've been thinking you're photogenic, Senpai, and
I've been wanting to take your picture for a while now...
But I thought it would be weird to ask you to let me take your picture out of the blue, so
I thought I'd try to snap some good shots during breaks or after school,
\N[0001]and get some great photos of you...！！
Hmmph... If you felt that way, you could have just told me...
We even discussed taking pictures today, didn't we?
I took some other stuff while I was at it, and I couldn't bring myself to say anything...
Ahahaha... I didn't mean to take any weird photos...！
So, will you allow my curiosity too？
Mchu…Haa…You took a picture of me like this, so,
You gotta make it up to me…Okay？
Hey…How far did you go with Shibata？
We've been dating for a month now,
Y-you've been weird since a while ago…！ S-suddenly doing this…
Haa…Did you think I was being nice to you without any ulterior motives？
Even Shibata, without realizing it, ended up making such a cute girlfriend…
I…I wanna date Kana-chan and do things like this～
The date was fun, wasn't it? Let's do it again, okay?
Huff... huff... no good... Shibata-kun is...
But, this reaction... you haven't even kissed yet, have you？
Well then, let's practice with me.
That's right. You want Shibata-kun to enjoy it, don't you？
Look, there's a model right here. Think of it as Shibata-kun, okay?
N-no way！！ That's not good... I think！！
Is that so... Kana-chan is really a good girl, isn't she?
You're a good girl who won't betray your boyfriend easily. Shibata-kun will be happy, won't he？
… Senpai... let's stop this, okay? This kind of thing...
Please go back to being the Senpai you've been until now！
What if I say I don't want to？
… I-I like the Senpai you've been until now, so...
I like the usual Senpai who's kind and reliable.
Yes. As my Senpai. So, th-therefore...
You thought I was going to say that？
Ahhh... no, no way... what is this...
You understand, right？ This. My dick.
I'm like this because of the melting kiss with Kana-chan.
Hey... you don't even know how to handle this, do you？
Ah... it's nice inside Kana-chan's mouth...
Come on, be careful not to scratch with your teeth？
Fuhahaha♪ It's nice inside a girl's mouth...
No way... make me cum with more pleasure.
Ah... that's it... you're a good girl... Kana-chan...
Let's lick it more with your tongue.
You're so good at blowjobs, Shibata will surely be delighted too.
Huh？ Did you get quieter than before？ Are you giving up resisting？
B-but... even if I resist, you won't stop, so...
Ah... good... feels good... Kana-chan... Kana-chan...
Kana-chan... I like you... I love you, Kana-chan... I...
Ahh, ahh, ahh... I'm getting a blowjob from Kana-chan... it's great... can't get enough...
I'm savoring Kana-chan before my boyfriend Shibata...
Fufu, what's with that face? Aren't you actually feeling it?
Ahh... I'm gonna cum... can I cum in your mouth, Kana-chan？
Ah！？ No... no way... not inside...
It's fine, it's just my mouth... can't you listen to senpai's request？
Ahh... ahh... feels good... this is crazy... feels good...
If you spit it out, it'll be a shock... Shibata will be shocked too, you know？
Haa... haa... W-well, please go home already for today...
W-wha...！ Y-you were planning on seeing it through to the end！？
If you're willing to do it, Kana-chan.
Just... give me some time to think calmly, okay?
But... th-this kind of thing happened with Shibata-kun,
I don't know how to explain it...
W-well... you just said you liked me a little while ago...
A-ah, did my true feelings slip out？
True feelings...？ So, when you said you liked me back then...
Even if you say you like me when it's like this, half-forced like this...
You're really a kind person, aren't you, Kana-chan?
If it were anyone else, they'd probably throw me out and hate me, right？
N-Normally, I would be too... But... the time I spent with you,
was fun, and I liked going out to eat with you and Shibata-kun...
I don't want to change this current environment.
I'm sure Shibata-kun would be shocked if he knew about this...
So, shall we pretend today's incident never happened？
Will... you do that for me？
If that's what you want, Kana-chan.
Then... please pretend it never happened.
A-and let's spend next week normally and have fun, okay？
...Yeah, you're right. Sorry. I just couldn't help myself...
Kana-chan is really a good girl, and cute too.
You're always bright and just watching you gives me energy.
D-don't praise me so much, Senpai... I'm happy, but...
So, let's go back to being a good senpai and kouhai like before.
I was a bit looking forward to the photo session, but maybe some other time…
I see… Let's take some photos with the Photography Club next time…！
I'll introduce you to the club president too.
…Didn't you get a message from Kana today?
Want to send her a message？
